title: Design System: 公安食堂订餐

title.purpose: Page and card section headings in compact mobile screens.

body.purpose: Main form values, dish names, order information, and readable operational text.

label.purpose: Buttons, tabs, picker chips, badges, and admin controls.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card and meal row shadow.

shadows.name: control-lift
shadows.purpose: Primary button and selected pill lift.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Secondary panels that need stronger grouping.

shadows.name: header-lift
shadows.purpose: Top identity cards or major admin headers only.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Segmented controls, tabs, and selection feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main task action for login, submit, save, and export.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 46px; padding: 0 18px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #0f5f9f; color: #ffffff; font: 600 15px/46px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(15, 95, 159, 0.18); transition: transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0b2a4a; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(15, 95, 159, 0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #93c5fd; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Subtle Button
components.description: Supporting action for navigation, refresh, upload, and secondary admin actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-subtle { height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #93c5fd; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f5f9f; font: 600 14px/40px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-subtle:hover { background: #dbeafe; border-color: #0f5f9f; color: #0b2a4a; } .ds-btn-subtle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #93c5fd; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-subtle:active { background: #bfdbfe; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action for deleting dishes or ending sessions.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #ef4444; color: #ffffff; font: 600 14px/40px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18); transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #dc2626; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fca5a5; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-danger:active { background: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text field for login, binding, dish editing, and admin forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; } .ds-label { color: #4b5563; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-input { height: 42px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #1f2937; font: 400 15px/42px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0f5f9f; outline: none; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f1f3f5; color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Status Tag
components.description: Compact semantic state label for order and slot states.
components.html: 开放中已停止已订餐
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 999px; font: 600 12px/1 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; margin-right: 6px; } .ds-status-success { background: #d1fae5; color: #047857; } .ds-status-danger { background: #fee2e2; color: #dc2626; } .ds-status-info { background: #dbeafe; color: #2563eb; }

components.name: Work Card
components.description: Default operational surface for forms, summaries, and grouped controls.
components.html:
区间统计

选择日期后查询订餐汇总和导出任务。
components.css: .ds-card { width: 280px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #1f2937; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #4b5563; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.45; }

components.name: Meal Tabs
components.description: Segmented meal navigation for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab-active">早餐</button><button class="ds-tab">中餐</button><button class="ds-tab">晚餐</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 5px; width: 300px; padding: 3px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; } .ds-tab { height: 34px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; transition: background 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-tab:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #93c5fd; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-tab-active { background: #ffffff; color: #0b2a4a; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); }

components.name: Meal Package Card
components.description: Selectable dish row with image, price, and fixed quantity controls.
components.html:
减脂套餐¥12 / 份
2
components.css: .ds-meal-card { display: flex; gap: 8px; width: 320px; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease; } .ds-meal-card-selected { border-color: #0f5f9f; background: #dbeafe; } .ds-meal-img { width: 72px; height: 72px; flex: 0 0 auto; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e5e7eb, #f9fafb); } .ds-meal-main { min-width: 0; flex: 1; display: grid; gap: 4px; } .ds-meal-main strong { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; color: #1f2937; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-meal-main span { color: #0b2a4a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-qty { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; } .ds-qty button { width: 28px; height: 28px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #0f5f9f; color: #ffffff; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-qty b { width: 38px; text-align: center; color: #1f2937; font-size: 14px; }

components.name: Admin Edit Card
components.description: Dense dish-management surface for editing meal image, name, price, unit, category, and actions.
components.html:
中餐
普通套餐
components.css: .ds-admin-card { width: 340px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Source Han Sans SC', sans-serif; } .ds-admin-top { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-admin-img { width: 84px; height: 66px; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e5e7eb, #f9fafb); flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-admin-fields { flex: 1; min-width: 0; display: grid; gap: 5px; } .ds-badge { justify-self: start; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: #dbeafe; color: #0b2a4a; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-admin-fields input { min-width: 0; height: 34px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; color: #1f2937; font-size: 13px; } .ds-admin-fields input:focus { border-color: #0f5f9f; outline: none; } .ds-inline { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 0.8fr 0.6fr 1fr; gap: 5px; align-items: center; } .ds-inline span { height: 34px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: #dbeafe; color: #0b2a4a; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 34px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 5px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-actions button { min-width: 0; height: 32px; border: 1px solid #93c5fd; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f5f9f; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-actions .ds-danger { border-color: #ef4444; background: #ef4444; color: #ffffff; } .ds-actions .ds-primary { border-color: #0f5f9f; background: #0f5f9f; color: #ffffff; }

narrative.overview:
This system should feel like a calm internal service counter: orderly enough for administrative trust, fast enough for daily meal decisions, and warm enough to belong to a canteen rather than a command console. The visual language is restrained product UI: cool gray background, white operational surfaces, 公安蓝 authority color, amber meal hints, and compact mobile controls.

The product must feel 稳重、清晰、高效. It explicitly rejects internet marketing style, overly playful consumer app treatment, and outdated government system aesthetics. Familiar mobile patterns are not a compromise here; they are the reason officers, kitchen staff, and administrators can complete work without pausing to interpret the interface.
keyCharacteristics: 公安蓝 used for authority, current selection, and primary action only.
White cards and cool gray backgrounds create separation without visual noise.
Status, cutoff, export, and permission states are shown in plain Chinese and consistent color roles.
Dense admin views are acceptable when hierarchy makes scanning faster.

rules.name: The One Authority Rule
rules.body: Police Blue is reserved for the current task path: primary action, selected state, and admin authority. Do not use it as decoration.

rules.name: The Warmth Limit Rule
rules.body: Meal Amber appears only where it clarifies food, deadline, or caution context. It must not become a general accent system.

rules.name: The No Marketing Gradient Rule
rules.body: Gradients may appear only on compact app headers already present in the mini-program. Never use them as promotional hero treatment, decorative backgrounds, or attention grabbing banners.

rules.name: The Native Utility Rule
rules.body: Use one system sans stack everywhere. Do not introduce display fonts, ornamental numerals, or type pairings for flavor.

rules.name: The Plain Chinese Rule
rules.body: Labels must be direct and operational: 提交本时段订单, 执行导出, 停止订餐, 保存菜品. Avoid promotional phrases and clever copy.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Use borders and tonal surfaces before adding stronger shadows. If a shadow is noticeable before the content is read, it is too strong.

dos: Do keep the product 稳重、清晰、高效 through restrained color, native typography, and direct labels.
Do make ordering, managing slots, checking totals, and exporting data reachable through predictable flows.
Do use Police Blue for primary action, selected state, and trusted admin authority.
Do use semantic tags for open, closed, verified, cancelled, expired, loading, and error states.
Do keep Chinese text readable on small phone screens with fixed control dimensions and clear wrapping behavior.
Do preserve enough warmth for a daily meal service through food imagery, Meal Amber hints, and plain helpful copy.
donts: Don't create an internet marketing style, exaggerated hero treatment, promotional copy, loud gradients, or sales-driven visual language.
Don't make the interface too playful: no cute icons, novelty motion, celebratory styling, or childish visual tone.
Don't reproduce outdated government system aesthetics: no cramped legacy tables, weak hierarchy, stale gray blocks, or bureaucratically heavy copy.
Don't use side-stripe borders such as border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent. Replace them with full borders, soft status backgrounds, icons, or clear status tags.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or modal-first flows.
Don't let admin density become visual clutter. If a screen carries many controls, group them by task and keep action hierarchy explicit.
